conflict: Administrative documents expose large unpaid hospital balances linked to Maya's final treatment months.
consequence: Anika converts grief into a rescue narrative: winning becomes her imagined route to fixing family debt, escalating self-imposed pressure.
must_land_beats: Fee-waiver appointment requires income and debt disclosure.
Anika sees itemized oncology debt total for the first time.
Ravi minimizes the numbers but cannot hide overdue notices.
Anika silently adds extra sessions to her private plan.
objective: Submit hardship paperwork for tournament fees.
